[{"role": "assistant", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "OpenTelemetry is an observability framework that provides tools, APIs, and SDKs for collecting telemetry data, such as metrics and traces, from applications. It aims to unify various observability efforts under one umbrella, enabling better insights into software performance and behavior (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/OpenTelemetry).\n\nAs for its maturity level within the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), OpenTelemetry is currently classified as a \"Graduated\" project, signifying that it is stable, has wide adoption, and meets the CNCF's criteria for maturity (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cloud_Native_Computing_Foundation)."}], "finish_reason": "stop"}]
